description_long: This is a retro-style, two-door refrigerator with a vibrant purple exterior and black trim. The front features two prominent, horizontally oriented black handles, one for each compartment, and a decorative heart-shaped magnet with a note attached. On top of the refrigerator, there is a red canister, a framed drawing of a flower, and a small red dish, adding a touch of personality. The refrigerator stands on a black base with a visible vent grille at the bottom rear, and a black power cord extends from the back. The surface appears slightly matte with some wear and subtle texture, suggesting it has been used in a lived-in urban environment. The overall design is boxy with rounded edges, and the object is large enough to be a standard household appliance.
description: A retro purple two-door refrigerator with black handles, decorative magnets, and items on top, featuring a visible vent and power cord.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the purple back panel, a black vent grille at the bottom, and the power cord extending outward; items on top are visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat purple side, the protruding handles, and the power cord trailing along the ground.
description_view_2: Front view displaying both black handles, a heart magnet with a note, and items on top including a red canister and framed drawing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the purple side, the edge of the handles, and the items on top; the power cord is also visible trailing behind.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, horizontally oriented black handles placed on the left edge of each door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular black vent grille with horizontal slats located at the bottom rear.
